evals.name: debug-static-files-production
evals.prompt: My Django app works locally, but static files disappear in the Docker container with DEBUG=False. What should I test and change?
evals.expected_output: Names static serving as the deployment risk, recommends production-like local checks, covers collectstatic/WhiteNoise/settings, and includes focused verification.

evals.name: staging-release-checklist
evals.prompt: We are deploying a Django feature that writes to the database and sends email. Build me a test-driven staging checklist.
evals.expected_output: Includes migrations, env vars, email staging behavior, logs, functional smoke checks, and rollback/cleanup notes.
